parameters.query:
WITH inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO appointments (psychologist_id, patient_id, scheduled_at, duration_minutes, appointment_type, status, created_at, updated_at)
  VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3::timestamptz, $4::integer, $5, 'scheduled', NOW(), NOW())
  RETURNING id, patient_id, scheduled_at, duration_minutes, appointment_type
)
SELECT
  i.id,
  i.scheduled_at,
  i.duration_minutes,
  i.appointment_type,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.email
FROM inserted i
JOIN patients p ON p.id = i.patient_id
UPDATE appointments SET google_calendar_event_id = $1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2::uuid

options.responseData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, appointment_id: $('PG - INSERT Cita').item.json.id, calendar_event_id: $('Google Calendar - Crear Evento').item.json.id }) }}
